name: waiting room
hints: Middle floor waiting room with a mirror and open shaft. A mysterious figure was here.
FOLLOW MYSTERIOUS - 'He went west!' GO SHAFT enters the elevator shaft.
GO SHAFT to room 9. WEST to skyscraper exterior (room 17). FOLLOW MYSTERIOUS points west.
notes: Middle floor waiting room. GO SHAFT to room 9. WEST to skyscraper side (room 17). Mysterious figure went west.
